description_long: This is a freestanding water cooler with a rectangular, upright body made of light gray plastic or metal, topped by a large, translucent blue water bottle. The front features two distinct spouts, each with a colored lever—one red and one blue—indicating hot and cold water dispensing. Below the spouts is a recessed area for placing cups, and a small drip tray is likely present to catch spills. The back of the unit is flat with visible panel screws and a small control area, while the sides are plain and unadorned. The water bottle is cylindrical and slightly ribbed, fitting securely into the top of the cooler. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for public or office environments, and the surfaces appear smooth and easy to clean.
description: A tall, rectangular water cooler with a large blue water bottle on top and two colored spouts for hot and cold water dispensing. The body is light gray with a simple, functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the water bottle, two colored spouts, and the dispensing area.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, smooth side panel and the profile of the water bottle.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the flat back panel with screws and a small control area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the unadorned side and water bottle profile.
attribute_dispenser_spout_type: lever spout with colored paddle levers
attribute_control_panel_design: Small front panel with two colored levers (red and blue) and a recessed dispensing area; rear has a small control area with indicators.
